arts.ttl: Jamie Gittens 'Ready to Snub' Arsenal and Chelsea
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund winger Jamie Gittens wants to stay in his current surroundings instead of joining Arsenal or Chelsea

arts.ttl: Sensational Serie A ace’s contract situation sees him on Arsenal’s list for 2025
arts.sum: Arsenal are getting ever closer to Man City’s level, as was shown with a brilliant performance at the Etihad Stadium at the weekend. Mikel Arteta’s men managed to stifle their hosts right up until the last knockings of injury time, though City must also deserve credit for a never-say-die attitude. Given that the Gunners were […] The post Sensational Serie A ace’s contract situation sees him on Arsenal’s list for 2025 appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arteta’s €300m transfer plan to solve Arsenal’s biggest problem
arts.sum: Indeed, the players who Arteta is chasing have all been linked with the club previously, including Juventus striker Dusan Vlahovic, RB Leipzig ’s Benjamin Sesko, Inter Milan ’s Marcus Thuram and Lille ’s Jonathan David . Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has a major transfer plan for next summer and has drawn up a shortlist of players worth nearly €300 million in order to achieve it.

arts.ttl: How to watch Arsenal vs Bolton: TV channel and live stream for Carabao Cup today
Exclusive: Arsenal have serious interest in exciting €80m-rated talent but Liverpool will push hard after scouting mission
arts.sum: Although Arsenal won’t be able to complete any transfers before the January transfer window, unless an unexpected free transfer reveals itself, the Gunners are already looking ahead to the new year. arts.ttl: Arsenal line ups vs Bolton as five debuts made, Raya out, Saka starts
arts.sum: Coley's XI: Porter; Timber, Saliba, Gabriel, Kiwior; Partey, Jorginho, Nwaneri; Sterling, Jesus, Martinelli. Holland's XI: Porter; Timber, Heaven, Gabriel, Lewis-Skelly; Jorginho, Rice, Nwaneri; Martinelli, Jesus, Sterling.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes seven changes, 18-year-old makes his debut: Arsenal predicted XI vs Bolton
arts.sum: Josh Nichols could be in line for a debut 👀

The Trotters got off to a winning start in League One this season, beating Leyton Orient 2-1 away from home before knocking Mansfield Town out of the Carabao Cup on penalties following a 1-1 draw. Bolton have won just one of their last 23 away games against us (D4 L18), winning 3-1 at Highbury in a FA Cup fourth round replay in February 1994 under future Gunners manager Bruce Rioch.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Evan Ferguson transfer update as Mikel Arteta makes 'surprise' claim
arts.sum: Arsenal take on Bolton Wanderers in the Carabao Cup as they look to return to winning ways following their draw with Manchester City and Mikel Arteta has injury concerns

arts.ttl: What TV channel is Carabao Cup on? Sky Sports+ explained for Arsenal and Liverpool games
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool begin their Carabao Cup campaigns today by facing Bolton and West Ham at home respectively in the third-round, with Sky Sports and Sky Sports+ showing all of the action
